title: Sirniki
description: This FD addon adds a traditional Slavic dish — sirniki!
body:
**My first project :P**

This little Farmer’s Delight addon adds *sirniki* (cheesecakes) to the game with various effects.

In the future, I plan to add more variations of sirniki with different effects and interactions with other mods. I love sirniki :3

**Recommended:**  
Install [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) – it will help in future updates.

If you encounter an error, write to me in [Telegram](https://t.me/Ssirnichek)
